reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.27

A one-time "what's new" prompt now explains the location-based reminders feature after updating, with a clear skip option (dismissible by button or tapping outside) for anyone who'd rather not read it.

ai-scanner.notes: Adds a duplicate-photo finder (Settings -> Find Duplicates): finds screenshots that are 100% byte-for-byte identical and lets you actually delete the extra copy to reclaim storage, not just remove it from the app's list. Only exact matches count -- no fuzzy/perceptual similarity. Deletion goes through Android's own system confirmation dialog; if you decline, nothing is touched.
